promotion_boundary.reason: XGB alpha158_fund promoted to primary; HF PatchTST to readonly shadow. On 2026-06-23 data XGB beats PatchTST decisively (XGB real IC +0.054, passes overall placebo + WF floor; PatchTST real IC -0.02, FAILS placebo, all-negative scores, 0 live trades). XGB itself did NOT pass the WF promotion gate (regime-sanity BULL_CALM/CHOPPY + BULL_CALM monotonicity) and lags SPY; promoted by operator override behind the residual controls below.

global_calibration.refit_note: Re-fit 2026-06-22 against the deployed XGB scorer; scorer_model_content_fingerprint matches.

conviction_gate.role: quality guard — only buy calibrated E[R-SPY] >= 3% (renquant-pipeline #140)

regime_admission.residual_risk: All-regime trading per operator directive; XGB weak in BULL_CALM (IC +0.0149); conviction_gate mu_floor is the active guard; risks disclosed.

disclosed_risks: XGB FAILED the WF promotion gate: regime-sanity (BULL_CALM, CHOPPY) + BULL_CALM trade-monotonicity.
Lags SPY: 0/3 walk-forward cuts beat SPY APY.
Weak in the dominant regime BULL_CALM (real IC +0.0149, below the 0.02 floor, placebo > real).
Aggregate real IC +0.054 is BEAR-inflated (carried by a rare, unvalidatable BEAR regime).
follow_up_exit_criteria: Strengthen the BULL_CALM cross-sectional signal so regime admission can be re-enabled and the override withdrawn.
Re-gate XGB after the signal fix and promote only on an organic pass.
Repair PatchTST to positive real IC or retire it from shadow.

threshold_sensitivity_top_of_cross_secti.note: Calibrated E[R-SPY] (mu) of the top admitted names on the 2026-06-23 BULL_CALM cross-section. mu_floor selects the high-mu tail; the set thins steeply above 0.04 -> 0.03 is the knee that keeps a workable book.

mu_floor_evidence.cut_level: ConvictionGateTask drops the low-mu tail (~15-20% of rank-floor survivors at mu_floor=0.03) on top of VetoWeakBuys.
mu_floor_evidence.honest_caveat: mu_floor is a COARSE QUALITY FILTER that keeps the highest-calibrated-mu names; it is NOT a proof of robustness in BULL_CALM. XGB's BULL_CALM real IC is ~+0.0149 (placebo > real), so the underlying signal is near-zero-information there and no mu threshold manufactures edge. This override deliberately accepts weak-regime trading behind this coarse filter, pending the withdrawal trigger below.

override_withdrawal_trigger: Re-enable regime_admission (withdraw all-regime override) when a model refresh lifts BULL_CALM placebo-clean IC >= +0.02 (the residual-audit / signal-repair success bar).
OR if live BULL_CALM realized P&L underperforms SPY by >= 3% over the next 20 closed BULL_CALM trades.
